heading: Have an idea for
body: We work with founders, brands and operators across the MENA market — from AI-powered commerce builds to Arabic-first content platforms, marketplaces and community products. We'd love to hear what you're building.

vitals.v: Build and operate digital products for the MENA market
End-to-end ownership — design, build, deploy, run
Product partnerships, equity builds, contract delivery
Built on our Webziq multi-tenant platform
